LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER JEFFREY MIZE'S PETITION TO VACATE MODIFIED ARBITRATION AWARD AND PETITION TO CORRECT AND CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT IN CONFORMITY THEREWITH: JEFFREY MIZE'S PETITION TO VACATE/CORRECT ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED IN PART. THE COURT VACATES THE MODIFIED AWARD ISSUED IN JANUARY 2021, CORRECTS THE FINAL AWARD ISSUED IN NOVEMBER 2020 AS EXPLAINED BELOW, AND JUDGMENT SHALL BE ENTERED ON THE CORRECTED FINAL AWARD. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Vacate Modified Arbitration Award And Petition To Correct And Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformity Therewith
Off Calendar Jun-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER JEFFREY MIZE'S Petition To Vacate Modified Arbitration Award And Petition To Correct And Confirm Arbitration Award And Enter Judgment In Conformity Therewith:

Jeffrey Mize's petition to vacate/correct arbitration award is granted in part. The court vacates the Modified Award issued in January 2021, corrects the Final Award issued in November 2020 as explained below, and judgment shall be entered on the corrected Final Award.
[SEE WORD MINUTES FOR DETAILS]

Order is signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
